name: Chroma
tagline: Chroma is the open-source search and retrieval database for AI applications.
description:
Chroma is the open-source search and retrieval database for AI applications.

Docs: https://cookbook.chromadb.dev/?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  chromadb:
    image: chromadb/chroma:1.0.15
    volumes:
      - chroma-data:/data
    environment:
      - IS_PERSISTENT=TRUE
      - PERSIST_DIRECTORY=/data
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - cat < /dev/null > /dev/tcp/localhost/8000
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42010:8000
volumes:
  chroma-data: null
